title: Deployment patterns: batch / real-time / streaming / edge + DSA 1-D DP
focus: Latency budgets, async inference, when to push to device.

items.label: Longest Palindromic Substring
interviewQuestions: Compare expand-around-center (O(n²) time, O(1) space) vs Manacher's (O(n)).
Why is DP O(n²) time AND O(n²) space — and does it actually beat expand-around-center in practice?

items.label: Palindromic Substrings
interviewQuestions: State the DP: define the state, the transition, and the base case explicitly.
Top-down (memoized recursion) vs bottom-up (tabulation) — which is more natural here, and why?
Can you space-optimize from O(n) to O(1)? Show the rolling-window trick.

items.label: Batch vs real-time vs streaming inference
interviewQuestions: Compare batch, real-time, and streaming inference — when do you reach for each?
What's the latency budget for an ad CTR model vs a churn model?

items.label: Edge deployment & on-device ML
interviewQuestions: When does on-device ML beat cloud inference, and what are the constraints?
What model-side techniques (quantization, pruning, distillation) actually move the needle for mobile?

items.label: Async inference & queues
interviewQuestions: When would you use async inference behind a queue?
How do you size a queue worker pool for spiky inference traffic without over-provisioning?
